name: Shireen Durand
description_en: Shireen is one of the younger members of House Durand, she sculpted 2 Stony Suppressor. Dominick and 2 Durand Sculptor are her parents.
description_fr: Shireen est l'un des plus jeunes membres de la Maison Durand, elle a sculpté 2 Stony Suppressor. Ses parents sont Dominick et 2 Durand Sculptor.
